questions.question: Explain the difference between population variance and sample variance. Why do we use different formulas?
expectedPoints: Population variance uses N in denominator
n-1 provides unbiased estimate of population variance
Sample variance compensates for estimating population mean from sample

questions.question: Describe how descriptive statistics are used in the machine learning workflow, specifically in data preprocessing and feature selection.
expectedPoints: Understanding data distributions for normalization decisions
Correlation analysis for removing redundant features
Informing strategy for handling imbalanced data
Guiding choices for data transformation techniques
